name: eval datasets: every record contains {input, expected} at minimum (eval harness inputs)
command: find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets" -name "*.jsonl" | while read f; do node -e 'require("fs").readFileSync("'"$f"'","utf8").trim().split("\n").forEach(l=>{const j=JSON.parse(l);if(!j.input||!j.expected)throw new Error("FAIL "+process.argv[1])})' "$f" || exit 1; done; echo ok 1>&2
